body: {"query": "query { addressInfo(address: \"{address}\") { id username hasTwitter hasGithub hasDiscord hasTelegram hasGoogle hasWorldcoin humanityType isBot hasSolanaAddress } }"}
description: Galxe account registered and not flagged as bot — has a profile, not classified as bot
expression: (() => { const i = data.data?.addressInfo; return !!(i?.id && i.id.length > 0 && i.isBot === false); })()

body: {"query": "query { addressInfo(address: \"{address}\") { id hasEmail hasTwitter hasGithub hasDiscord hasTelegram hasGoogle hasWorldcoin } }"}
expression: (() => { const i = data.data?.addressInfo; if (!i || !i.id) return false; return !!(i.hasEmail || i.hasTwitter || i.hasGithub || i.hasDiscord || i.hasTelegram || i.hasGoogle || i.hasWorldcoin); })()
